title: DNS Tool: Domain Security Audit Platform
description:
![Owl of Athena](https://dnstool.it-help.tech/static/images/owl-of-athena.png)

# DNS Tool — Domain Security Audit Platform

**DNS Tool** is an open-core OSINT platform for RFC-compliant domain security analysis using confidence-scored interpretation derived from ICD 203 taxonomy.

## Protocols / signals evaluated
- SPF, DKIM, DMARC, BIMI
- DNSSEC, DANE
- MTA-STS, TLS-RPT
- CAA
- HTTPS/SVCB records

## Outputs
- Engineer-level DNS Intelligence Reports
- Executive-level DNS Intelligence Briefs
- Confidence-scored security posture assessments
- Domain Confessions case study series

## Open-core architecture
This archive contains the complete public (OSS) source code.
All build-tag stubs (`_oss.go`) are included so the project
builds from source with `go build ./go-server/cmd/server`.
Proprietary intelligence modules (the `-tags intel` build) are
not included — they are closed-source and not required for
the core analysis functionality.

## Research publications
- Methodology paper: https://dnstool.it-help.tech/docs/dns-tool-methodology.pdf
- Philosophical Foundations: https://dnstool.it-help.tech/docs/philosophical-foundations.pdf
- Publications index: https://dnstool.it-help.tech/publications

- Live system: https://dnstool.it-help.tech

notes: Open-core project: this archive contains the complete OSS subset including all build-tag stubs required for compilation. Build with: go build ./go-server/cmd/server
